When the sun shall be folded up,Footnote-1
when the stars shall scatter away,Footnote-2
when the mountains shall be set in motion,Footnote-3
when the ten-months pregnant camels shall be abandoned,Footnote-4
when the savage beasts shall be brought together,Footnote-5
when the seas shall be set boiling,Footnote-6
whenFootnote-7 the souls shall be rejoined (with their bodies),Footnote-8
and when the girl-child buried alive shall be asked:
for what offence was she killed?Footnote-9
and when the scrolls of (men's) deeds shall be unfolded,
and when Heaven is laid bare;Footnote-10
and Hell is stoked,
and Paradise brought nigh:Footnote-11
then shall each person know what he has brought along.
No indeed;Footnote-12 I swear by the alternating stars
that hide,
and by the night as it recedes,
and the morn as it breathes.Footnote-13
Verily this is the word of a noble message-bearer;Footnote-14
one mightyFootnote-15 and held in honour with the Lord of the Throne;
there he is obeyedFootnote-16 and held trustworthy.Footnote-17
(O people of Makkah), your companionFootnote-18 is not mad;
he indeed saw the message-bearer on the clear horizon;Footnote-19
nor does he grudge (conveying this knowledge about) the Unseen;Footnote-20
nor is it a word of an accursed Satan.Footnote-21
Where to are you then heading?
It is nothing but Good Counsel for everyone in the world,
for everyone of you who wishes to follow the Straight Way;Footnote-22
but your wishing will not avail unless Allah, the Lord of the Universe, so wishes.Footnote-23
